paragraph1: My interest in programming began in 2019 through an introductory robotics course in high school with <robotc>ROBOTC</robotc> and <lego>LEGO Mindstorms EV3</lego> bots. The following summer, I picked up Mark Lee's book, <bookTitle>C++ Programming for the Absolute Beginner</bookTitle>, and started viewing software engineering as a potential career.
paragraph2: Fast forward {yearsSinceStart} years, I'm currently a fourth-year Computer Science student at York University. I have had the privilege of gaining professional software development experience across startup, public-sector, and research environments. My primary skill is full-stack web development, and I'm currently delving deeper into distributed computing and cloud technologies.
paragraph3: In my spare time, I'm usually practicing tar (Persian classical instrument) or playing chess.
